name: Fraud Upon the Court Chain Builder

root_fraud.description: Emily Watson filed PPO (2023-5907-PP) based on fabricated allegations
evidence: Oct 15, 2023: Fabricated cocaine straw allegation — no evidence, no history
Filed PPO citing baseless harassment claims
Used professional knowledge (Kent County caseworker) to craft false narrative
root_fraud.legal_status: FRAUDULENT FOUNDATION — everything built on this is tainted

infected_orders.infection_path: Direct fraud — based on fabricated allegations
PPO used as evidence of "danger" to support custody restrictions
infected_orders.authority: MCR 2.612(C)(3) — independent action for fraud on the court

infected_orders.infection_path: Built on manufactured police report NS2505044 (Albert Watson admitted premeditation)
infected_orders.status: VOID — no required findings per MCL 722.27a(3)
infected_orders.authority: MCL 722.27a(3) — ex parte requires specific findings; MCR 2.612(C)(1)(d) — void

infected_orders.infection_path: Based on void PPO + tainted custody order + fraudulent ex parte
infected_orders.authority: Wong Sun v United States, 371 US 471 (1963) — fruit of poisonous tree doctrine

infected_orders.infection_path: Built on foundation of fraudulent initial proceedings
infected_orders.authority: MCR 2.612(C)(3) — NO time bar for fraud on the court

void_ab_initio: Emily's Aug 2025 Ex Parte — no MCL 722.27a(3) findings + manufactured basis
voidable: Custody order (2024-001507-DC) — tainted by fraudulent PPO evidence
Any order relying on HealthWest evaluation (weaponized/biased)
Parenting time restrictions built on void orders

relief_mechanism.primary: MCR 2.612(C)(3) — Independent action for fraud on the court (NO TIME LIMIT)
relief_mechanism.federal: 42 USC §1983 — Due process violation (3 years SOL)

fruit_of_poisonous_tree.consequence: Andrew restricted from contact, portrayed as dangerous

fruit_of_poisonous_tree.original_poison: PPO used as evidence in custody proceedings

Andrew pathologized for asserting legal rights
